contract.goal: Close the operator-priority gap with three pieces that together make the ev-linear interactive loop fully functional including its inner-RPI scope-shift sub-sequence: (a) bin/linear-loom revise-plan CLI verb; (b) /linear-loom-revise-plan skill (flavor-routed interview); (c) /ev-linear:ev-loop-interactive skill ported from ev's 619-line source.
acceptance_criteria: New plugins/linear-loom/cli/lib/revision-log.ts: appendRevisionLogEntry(content, date, rationale). Mirrors loom's plan.ts:227-250 shape but extracted for linear-loom standalone-ness. +4 tests covering fresh-section / newest-first / multi-blank-tolerance / no-trailing-newline.

New plugins/linear-loom/cli/verbs/revise-plan.ts: revisePlan async verb. Reads --revision-file, validates --rationale, resolves marker, checks PLAN.md exists (injectable existsFn), appends Revision log via the lib, writes via injectable writeFileFn, commits via gitRunner (unless --no-commit). Error codes: missing-slug, missing-args (×2), marker-unreadable (bubbled), plan-not-found, revision-read-failed, plan-write-failed. +9 tests.
Wired into plugins/linear-loom/cli/linear-loom.ts VERBLESS_HANDLERS as `revise-plan: (rest) => revisePlan(rest)`.

New plugins/linear-loom/skills/linear-loom-revise-plan/SKILL.md: derived from /loom-revise-plan (290 lines) → ~230 lines after dropping griot integration. Same flavor-routed interview; research branch spawns /linear-loom-research; CLI commit goes through bin/linear-loom revise-plan; no bin/griot use in the sub-agent startup brief.

New plugins/ev-linear/skills/ev-loop-interactive/SKILL.md: derived from ev:ev-loop-interactive (619 lines) → 533 lines after extensive simplification (the disclaimers themselves are the extra mass; the substrate-swap removed surface and the disclaimers replaced it with explicit not-supported notes). Step 4.5 REMOVED; auto-mode + scope-shift event emissions removed; inner-RPI spawns /linear-loom-research + /linear-loom-revise-plan; § Compose PR notes the linear-loom pr-namespace stub + gh fallback; § Save session referenced as explicitly NOT supported.

Updated plugins/ev-linear/docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md (was placeholder): ships 6 recipes ev-loop-interactive cites — § State refresh, § Phase update, § Checkin write, § Triage PR comments, § Derive panel, § Compose PR (with gh fallback). Cross-plugin references for AGENT-CONVENTIONS + PANEL-COMPOSITION documented.
npm test → 928 passing across 67 files. Baseline 911 after Phase 7 U1. Net +17 (4 revision-log + 9 revise-plan + 4 marketplace-test recounts from the existing ev-linear plugin entry).
rules_applied: DESIGN.md § 14 (linear-loom-* skills diverge from loom-* skills where substrate posture differs).
DESIGN.md § 17 (ev-linear is a parallel plugin to ev — derivatives of ev's skill bodies with substrate references swapped).
DESIGN.md § 18 (ev-linear excises griot integration entirely — no rollup load, no capture writes, no recurring-threshold append).
DESIGN.md § 8 (no events.jsonl in linear-loom — auto-mode and scope-shift event emissions are dropped).
Operator's grill-me posture this session: care specifically about /linear-loom-revise-plan; drop session / pr-events / events.jsonl emissions where the concept doesn't fit Linear-backed substrate.
disqualifiers: Building linear-loom session verb (operator dropped that surface for ev-linear).
Building linear-loom events append verb (DESIGN § 8 — read-only synthesis only).
Building linear-loom pr open/update/discover (Linear native GitHub integration owns the wiring; documented stub).
Restoring any griot reference (§ 18 is firm).
Porting docs/LOOM-CONVENTIONS.md (linear-loom has its own DESIGN.md).
Duplicating docs/AGENT-CONVENTIONS.md or docs/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md (cross-plugin reference instead).
inputs: plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/plan.ts:252-358 (loom's reviseVerb — canonical source for the verb port)
plugins/loom/skills/loom-revise-plan/SKILL.md (290 lines — canonical source for the skill port)
plugins/ev/skills/ev-loop-interactive/SKILL.md (619 lines — canonical source for the loop port)

actions: Wrote cli/lib/revision-log.ts: appendRevisionLogEntry that mirrors loom's helper shape. Drift-watch comment names the loom-side canonical helper. 4 tests cover fresh-section append, newest-first insert under existing heading, multi-blank-gap tolerance (matches loom-side observed behavior, not aspirational normalization), and content-without-trailing-newline.

Wrote cli/verbs/revise-plan.ts: revisePlan async verb. Resolves marker via readMarker; checks PLAN.md existence via injectable existsFn (clean for testing); reads revision file via injectable readFileFn; appends Revision log entry; writes via injectable writeFileFn; commits via gitRunner.addAndCommit unless --no-commit. 7 explicit error codes (missing-slug, missing-args ×2, marker-unreadable bubbled, plan-not-found, revision-read-failed, plan-write-failed). Date formatted to YYYY-MM-DD via injectable now().

Wrote 9 verb tests covering all 7 error codes + success-path-with-commit (asserts written path + body contains Revision log + commit message shape) + --no-commit (assert addAndCommit not called) + --pretty pretty-prints. All DI; no fs/network access; fresh spies per test.
Wired revise-plan into linear-loom.ts VERBLESS_HANDLERS (verbless-namespace pattern matching configure/research/plan/retro). One import + one entry.

Wrote skills/linear-loom-revise-plan/SKILL.md: derived from /loom-revise-plan with three structural changes. (1) bin/loom → bin/linear-loom; (2) research sub-agent target is /linear-loom-research not /loom-research; (3) griot integration removed entirely — no bin/griot use at sub-agent startup, no § Capture finding scan, no plan-revise-budget-exhausted event emission (linear-loom has no events append). Same flavor-routed interview (mechanical vs research); same RECOVERY-STATUS.json shape for sub-agent failure recovery; same two-budget convergence (3 rounds × 10 decisions).

Wrote skills/ev-loop-interactive/SKILL.md (ev-linear): derived from ev:ev-loop-interactive with extensive simplification. Step 4.5 (recurring-threshold via griot capture) REMOVED entirely — replaced with an explicit disclaimer block. All 'alongside the event emission, write a session-note via § Capture finding' side blocks deleted. Auto-mode event emissions (auto-mode-entered, -converged, -budget-exhausted) deleted. Scope-shift event emission deleted. Inner-RPI sub-sequence spawns /linear-loom-research and /linear-loom-revise-plan (NOT the loom-side names). § Compose PR replaced with a stub note about linear-loom pr namespace + a gh fallback. § Save session referenced as explicitly NOT supported (not silently absent — affirmatively disclaimed). § Phase update points at Phase 6 U3's linear-loom phase update --phase=N --status=<loom-status>. § Checkin write points at Phase 6 U2's linear-loom checkin write --task=<key> --checkin-file=<path>. § State refresh uses linear-loom project read + events read.

Updated docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md (was a placeholder from U1): ships 6 recipes ev-loop-interactive cites — § State refresh, § Phase update, § Checkin write, § Triage PR comments, § Derive panel, § Compose PR. § Compose PR documents the gh-fallback shape since linear-loom's pr namespace is a Phase 6 stub. Cross-plugin references section explicitly names docs that ev-linear cites via path (AGENT-CONVENTIONS, PANEL-COMPOSITION) rather than duplicating.

Verified: npm test → 928 passing across 67 files (was 911 after Phase 7 U1; +17 net). Panel (contract-fit + test-unit, dual-evaluator panel given the markdown + TS surface): both approved on first run; zero findings.
corrections: Test fixture for revision-log's multi-blank-gap case asserted loom's actual observed behavior (heading + 2 blanks + new entry + 1 blank + old entry) rather than the helper's aspirational 'normalize to one blank line' comment. Documented in the test name + body: drift-aligned with loom-side, not a separate normalization contract.

First revise-plan test expected `marker-not-found` but readMarker surfaces ENOENT from the stubbed IO as `marker-unreadable`. Test renamed to 'bubbles up readMarker error' and corrected to assert the actual code. Substrate-shape confirmation, not a bug fix.

changes_since_previous: Second unit of Phase 7. With this PR merged, the ev-linear interactive loop is fully functional including its inner-RPI scope-shift sub-sequence. /linear-loom-revise-plan ships as both a CLI verb and a skill — the operator-priority piece. U3 (ev-loop-confidence) closes Phase 7.
notes_for_pr: Operator-priority piece (/linear-loom-revise-plan) lands here. The verb is a near-port of loom's reviseVerb with marker-based slug resolution + no Linear-side upload (decisions-in-git per § 14). The skill mirrors /loom-revise-plan but excises griot (no rollup load, no capture writes, no budget-exhaust event emission).

ev-loop-interactive port grew from ~400-line target to 533 lines. The drift is the disclaimers themselves: every place the loom-side skill had a 'write a session-note via § Capture finding' / 'emit auto-mode-budget-exhausted' / etc. block, the linear-loom port replaces it with an explicit 'NOT supported because <reason>' disclaimer. The substrate operates cleanly without these; the disclaimers exist for future-readers wondering why a familiar block from /ev-loop-interactive isn't present.

PR-compose path stays as gh-fallback: linear-loom's pr namespace is a Phase 6 stub (Linear native GitHub integration owns the wiring). The ev-linear loop's § Compose PR recipe runs `gh pr create` / `gh pr edit` directly. When/if a linear-loom-side compose-PR verb ships, the recipe upgrades and the gh fallback note goes away.

Save-session is explicitly disclaimed, not silently dropped. The skill body's § Save session disqualifier surfaces linear-loom's lack of session-write at the precise spots a /loom-revise-plan reader would expect the block — keeps the drift visible to future readers.

Cross-vocab discipline in the revise-plan verb: argv-side reads loom-substrate vocab (`--revision-file`, `--rationale`, `--no-commit`); output JSON uses loom-shape (`slug, path, committed, rationale`). The translation lives in the verb body. Matches the same pattern Phase 6 U4's events-synthesis lib introduced for the SynthesisInput / SynthesizedEvent boundary.
Lagged event note: this commit carries U1's pr-opened event for #49 (substrate-known gap; pr-opened lags the unit commit and rides into the next unit). Same pattern as Phase 6's lagged events.
scope-shift signals: zero. Clean continuation of Phase 7.

Substrate follow-up still standing: bin/guild derive-panel returns 'panel-spec-unreadable (using fallback)' under the marketplace-installed CLI. Used node plugins/guild/cli/guild.ts locally throughout Phase 7 U2.
